plan_snapshot:
Phase 6: Polish & Refactor — CSS refinement, responsive layout, keyboard shortcuts, OCR detection, config persistence, Electron prep, Dockerfile

Goal: Polish existing codebase with minor refactors and improvements identified during exploration.

Tasks (to be refined on the go):
1. Scoped CSS + design system variables
2. Responsive layout (mobile-friendly)
3. Keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+C/V/X/A/Z + context menu)
4. OCR availability detection + hint banner
5. Config persistence (localStorage backup + config.json sync)
6. Electron main process + build script
7. Dockerfile for containerized deployment
